_HELP.offsets: Fresh tire lap time difference relative to MEDIUM (in seconds).
_HELP.degradation: Base performance loss rate per lap after reaching the threshold.
_HELP.thresholds: Number of laps a tire can run before performance starts to degrade.
_HELP.power_factors: The exponent for the degradation curve (rate * (age - threshold)^power).
_HELP.temp_factors: Linear sensitivity of degradation to track temperature.
_HELP.track_pit_penalties: Track-specific adjustments to simulated pit stop time loss.
_HELP.pit_exit_penalty: Fallback pit entry/exit penalty if track is not listed.
_HELP.temp_ref: Reference temperature (Celsius) used for delta-temp calculations.
_HELP.track_deg_multipliers: Scaling factor for tire wear based on track surface abrasive properties.
_HELP.temp_hot_factors: Extra degradation penalty/bonus for temperatures above reference.
_HELP.temp_cold_factors: Extra degradation penalty/bonus for temperatures below reference.
